title: SIDBI SVCL – Legal Officer
shortInfo: The SIDBI Venture Capital (SIDBI SVCL) has released an official notification for the recruitment of Legal Officer posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply Offline through the official SIDBI SVCL website. The last date to submit the application form is 29-05-2026.
